Part.Source:
&Schema = !'dbo' &DatabaseName = !'BASE_ROLIVEIRA' AuditplusGetDatastoreParms.Call(!'Default',!'CategoriaProdutosComplementos', &ServerName, &DatabaseName, &Schema) &AuditSchema = !'auditplus' &AuditDatabaseName = !'BASE_ERPAUDIT' AuditplusGetDatastoreParms.Call(!'AuditPlus',!'AuditRecord', &AuditServerName, &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema)
Do Case Case &operation = !'DRP' Do 'Drop' Case &operation = !'INS' Do 'Insert' Case &operation = !'UPD' Do 'Update' Case &operation = !'DLT' Do 'Delete' EndCase
Sub 'Drop' &auditData += format(!"DROP TRIGGER [%1].[AuditCategoriaProdutosComplementosInsert]", &Schema) + NewLine() &auditData += format(!"DROP TRIGGER [%1].[AuditCategoriaProdutosComplementosUpdate]", &Schema) + NewLine() &auditData += format(!"DROP TRIGGER [%1].[AuditCategoriaProdutosComplementosDelete]", &Schema) + NewLine()
EndSub
Sub 'Insert' &auditData += format(!"CREATE TRIGGER [%1].[AuditCategoriaProdutosComplementosInsert]", &Schema) + NewLine() &auditData += format(!"ON [%1].[CategoriaProdutosComplementos]", &Schema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"AFTER INSERT" + NewLine() &auditData += !"AS" + NewLine() &auditData += !"BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET NOCOUNT ON;" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @Context varbinary(128)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @ContextTxt VarChar(100)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @ContextLength tinyint" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @DatabaseUser VarChar(80)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @UserNameVar VarChar(100)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @ExtraInfo VarChar(1000)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @index decimal(10,0)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordSessionId VarChar(36)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordId decimal(10,0)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordLastId decimal(10,0)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordLastTableId VarChar(36)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys VarChar(410)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RecordKeys VarChar(410)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @ParentRecordKeys VarChar(410)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @EmpCod_Inserted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @GrupCod_Inserted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @GrupComItmCod_Inserted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @GrupObsCod_Inserted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @GrupProCod_Inserted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @GrupObsComp_Inserted VARCHAR(MAX)" + NewLine()
&auditData += !"DECLARE Cursor_Inserted_Records CURSOR FOR SELECT EmpCod, GrupCod, GrupComItmCod, GrupObsCod, GrupProCod, GrupObsComp FROM INSERTED" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @DatabaseUser = SUSER_NAME()" + NewLine() &auditData += !"IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#AuditPlusSessionContext') IS NOT NULL BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @UserNameVar = username, @AuditRecordSessionId = sessionid, @AuditRecordLastId = auditid, @AuditRecordLastTableId = tableid, @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys = recordkeys, @ExtraInfo = extrainfo FROM #AuditPlusSessionContext WHERE id = 1;" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END ELSE BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += !"CREATE TABLE #AuditPlusSessionContext (id INT PRIMARY KEY, username VarChar(100), sessionid VarChar(36), auditid decimal(10,0), tableid VarChar(36), recordkeys VarChar(800), extrainfo VarChar(1000));" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @UserNameVar = ''" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordSessionId = CAST(NEWID() as VarChar(36))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastId = 0" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastTableId = ''" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys = ''" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @ExtraInfo = ''" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @Context = CONTEXT_INFO()" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @ContextLength = CONVERT(tinyint, SUBSTRING(@Context, 1, 1))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @ContextTxt = CONVERT(varchar(10), SUBSTRING(@Context, 2, 1 + @ContextLength))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"IF @ContextTxt IS NOT NULL AND ISNUMERIC(@ContextTxt) = 1 BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @AuditRecordLastId = CONVERT(float, @ContextTxt)" + NewLine() &auditData += format(!"SELECT @AuditRecordSessionId = [AuditRecordSessionId], @AuditRecordLastTableId = [AuditRecordTableGuid], @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys = [AuditRecordKeyValue] FROM [%1].[%2].[AuditRecord] WHERE [AuditRecordId] = @AuditRecordLastId;", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"END" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"OPEN Cursor_Inserted_Records" + NewLine() &auditData += !"FETCH NEXT FROM Cursor_Inserted_Records INTO @EmpCod_Inserted, @GrupCod_Inserted, @GrupComItmCod_Inserted, @GrupObsCod_Inserted, @GrupProCod_Inserted, @GrupObsComp_Inserted" + NewLine() &auditData += !"WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0" + NewLine() &auditData += !"BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @RecordKeys = RTRIM(CAST(@EmpCod_Inserted AS varchar(80))) + ', ' + RTRIM(CAST(@GrupCod_Inserted AS varchar(80))) + ', ' + RTRIM(CAST(@GrupComItmCod_Inserted AS varchar(80)))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @ParentRecordKeys = RTRIM(CAST(@EmpCod_Inserted AS varchar(80))) + ', ' + RTRIM(CAST(@GrupCod_Inserted AS varchar(80)))" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"IF NOT (@AuditRecordLastTableId = '91305681-84d9-4bdb-965c-49409d09b409' AND @ParentRecordKeys = @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys) BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastId = 0" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecord]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordDate]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordUser]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordDatabaseUser]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordOperation]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordTransactionGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordTableGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordKeyValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordSessionId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordParentId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordExtraInformation])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(GETDATE()" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@UserNameVar" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@DatabaseUser" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'UPDATE'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'ea965c6d-99dd-42f0-a80d-1152354ee841'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'91305681-84d9-4bdb-965c-49409d09b409'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@ParentRecordKeys" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@AuditRecordSessionId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",0" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@ExtraInfo)" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastId = SCOPE_IDENTITY()" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DELETE FROM #AuditPlusSessionContext WHERE id = 1" + NewLine() &auditData += !"INSERT INTO #AuditPlusSessionContext VALUES (1, @UserNameVar, @AuditRecordSessionId, @AuditRecordLastId, '91305681-84d9-4bdb-965c-49409d09b409', @ParentRecordKeys, @ExtraInfo)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @ContextTxt = CAST(@AuditRecordLastId as VarChar(10))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @ContextLength = LEN(@ContextTxt)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @Context = CONVERT(binary(1), @ContextLength) + CONVERT(varbinary(127), @ContextTxt)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET context_info @Context" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecord]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordDate]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordUser]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordDatabaseUser]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordOperation]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordTransactionGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordTableGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordKeyValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordSessionId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordParentId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordExtraInformation])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(GETDATE()" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@UserNameVar" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@DatabaseUser" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'INSERT'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'ea965c6d-99dd-42f0-a80d-1152354ee841'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'8b7e01a6-427b-47a0-aae4-4fde78392e55'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@RecordKeys" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@AuditRecordSessionId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@AuditRecordLastId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@ExtraInfo)" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordId = SCOPE_IDENTITY()" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributeGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesOldValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesNewValue])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(@AuditRecordId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@index" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'82b36cf7-a282-4cfb-8fd6-47eb2644bc7b'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",''" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@EmpCod_Inserted )" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributeGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesOldValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesNewValue])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(@AuditRecordId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@index" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'0e1b6d7e-3113-418c-a15d-c92c7edaa8bd'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",''" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@GrupCod_Inserted )" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributeGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesOldValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesNewValue])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(@AuditRecordId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@index" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'8d40114b-0615-474a-b970-ecec9835e4f0'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",''" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@GrupComItmCod_Inserted )" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributeGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesOldValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesNewValue])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(@AuditRecordId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@index" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'b4c1eb11-54e1-4345-8787-6f4c97ae8855'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",''" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@GrupObsCod_Inserted )" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributeGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesOldValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesNewValue])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(@AuditRecordId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@index" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'19e6e0f9-d7f1-4ce0-b2b0-fdef488be3f4'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",''" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@GrupProCod_Inserted )" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributeGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesOldValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesNewValue])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(@AuditRecordId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@index" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'1cfc3cbf-4445-4e52-8758-1cd534987b4c'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",''" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@GrupObsComp_Inserted )" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine()
&auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"FETCH NEXT FROM Cursor_Inserted_Records INTO @EmpCod_Inserted, @GrupCod_Inserted, @GrupComItmCod_Inserted, @GrupObsCod_Inserted, @GrupProCod_Inserted, @GrupObsComp_Inserted" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END " + NewLine() &auditData += !"CLOSE Cursor_Inserted_Records;" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END" + NewLine() EndSub
Sub 'Update' &auditData += format(!"CREATE TRIGGER [%1].[AuditCategoriaProdutosComplementosUpdate]", &Schema) + NewLine() &auditData += format(!"ON [%1].[CategoriaProdutosComplementos]", &Schema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"AFTER UPDATE" + NewLine() &auditData += !"AS" + NewLine() &auditData += !"BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET NOCOUNT ON;" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @Context varbinary(128)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @ContextTxt VarChar(100)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @ContextLength tinyint" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @DatabaseUser VarChar(80)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @UserNameVar VarChar(100)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @ExtraInfo VarChar(1000)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @index decimal(10,0)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordSessionId VarChar(36)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordId decimal(10,0)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordLastId decimal(10,0)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordLastTableId VarChar(36)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys VarChar(410)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RecordKeys VarChar(410)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @ParentRecordKeys VarChar(410)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @EmpCod_Deleted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @GrupCod_Deleted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @GrupComItmCod_Deleted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @GrupObsCod_Deleted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @GrupProCod_Deleted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @GrupObsComp_Deleted VARCHAR(MAX)" + NewLine()
&auditData += !"DECLARE Cursor_Deleted_Records CURSOR FOR SELECT EmpCod, GrupCod, GrupComItmCod, GrupObsCod, GrupProCod, GrupObsComp FROM DELETED" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @EmpCod_Inserted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @GrupCod_Inserted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @GrupComItmCod_Inserted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @GrupObsCod_Inserted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @GrupProCod_Inserted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @GrupObsComp_Inserted VARCHAR(MAX)" + NewLine()
&auditData += !"DECLARE Cursor_Inserted_Records CURSOR FOR SELECT EmpCod, GrupCod, GrupComItmCod, GrupObsCod, GrupProCod, GrupObsComp FROM INSERTED" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @DatabaseUser = SUSER_NAME()" + NewLine() &auditData += !"IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#AuditPlusSessionContext') IS NOT NULL BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @UserNameVar = username, @AuditRecordSessionId = sessionid, @AuditRecordLastId = auditid, @AuditRecordLastTableId = tableid, @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys = recordkeys, @ExtraInfo = extrainfo FROM #AuditPlusSessionContext WHERE id = 1;" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END ELSE BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += !"CREATE TABLE #AuditPlusSessionContext (id INT PRIMARY KEY, username VarChar(100), sessionid VarChar(36), auditid decimal(10,0), tableid VarChar(36), recordkeys VarChar(800), extrainfo VarChar(1000));" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @UserNameVar = ''" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordSessionId = CAST(NEWID() as VarChar(36))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastId = 0" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastTableId = ''" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys = ''" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @ExtraInfo = ''" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @Context = CONTEXT_INFO()" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @ContextLength = CONVERT(tinyint, SUBSTRING(@Context, 1, 1))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @ContextTxt = CONVERT(varchar(10), SUBSTRING(@Context, 2, 1 + @ContextLength))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"IF @ContextTxt IS NOT NULL AND ISNUMERIC(@ContextTxt) = 1 BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @AuditRecordLastId = CONVERT(float, @ContextTxt)" + NewLine() &auditData += format(!"SELECT @AuditRecordSessionId = [AuditRecordSessionId], @AuditRecordLastTableId = [AuditRecordTableGuid], @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys = [AuditRecordKeyValue] FROM [%1].[%2].[AuditRecord] WHERE [AuditRecordId] = @AuditRecordLastId;", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"END" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"OPEN Cursor_Deleted_Records" + NewLine() &auditData += !"OPEN Cursor_Inserted_Records" + NewLine() &auditData += !"FETCH NEXT FROM Cursor_Deleted_Records INTO @EmpCod_Deleted, @GrupCod_Deleted, @GrupComItmCod_Deleted, @GrupObsCod_Deleted, @GrupProCod_Deleted, @GrupObsComp_Deleted" + NewLine() &auditData += !"WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0" + NewLine() &auditData += !"BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"FETCH NEXT FROM Cursor_Inserted_Records INTO @EmpCod_Inserted, @GrupCod_Inserted, @GrupComItmCod_Inserted, @GrupObsCod_Inserted, @GrupProCod_Inserted, @GrupObsComp_Inserted" + NewLine() &auditData += !"IF @@FETCH_STATUS = 0" + NewLine() &auditData += !"BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"IF NOT (@EmpCod_Deleted = @EmpCod_Inserted AND @GrupCod_Deleted = @GrupCod_Inserted AND @GrupComItmCod_Deleted = @GrupComItmCod_Inserted AND (( @GrupObsCod_Deleted IS NULL AND @GrupObsCod_Inserted IS NULL) OR @GrupObsCod_Deleted = @GrupObsCod_Inserted) AND (( @GrupProCod_Deleted IS NULL AND @GrupProCod_Inserted IS NULL) OR @GrupProCod_Deleted = @GrupProCod_Inserted) AND (( @GrupObsComp_Deleted IS NULL AND @GrupObsComp_Inserted IS NULL) OR @GrupObsComp_Deleted = @GrupObsComp_Inserted) ) BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @RecordKeys = RTRIM(CAST(@EmpCod_Inserted AS varchar(80))) + ', ' + RTRIM(CAST(@GrupCod_Inserted AS varchar(80))) + ', ' + RTRIM(CAST(@GrupComItmCod_Inserted AS varchar(80)))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @ParentRecordKeys = RTRIM(CAST(@EmpCod_Inserted AS varchar(80))) + ', ' + RTRIM(CAST(@GrupCod_Inserted AS varchar(80)))" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"IF NOT (@AuditRecordLastTableId = '91305681-84d9-4bdb-965c-49409d09b409' AND @ParentRecordKeys = @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys) BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastId = 0" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecord]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordDate]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordUser]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordDatabaseUser]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordOperation]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordTransactionGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordTableGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordKeyValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordSessionId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordParentId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordExtraInformation])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(GETDATE()" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@UserNameVar" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@DatabaseUser" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'UPDATE'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'ea965c6d-99dd-42f0-a80d-1152354ee841'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'91305681-84d9-4bdb-965c-49409d09b409'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@ParentRecordKeys" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@AuditRecordSessionId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",0" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@ExtraInfo)" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastId = SCOPE_IDENTITY()" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DELETE FROM #AuditPlusSessionContext WHERE id = 1" + NewLine() &auditData += !"INSERT INTO #AuditPlusSessionContext VALUES (1, @UserNameVar, @AuditRecordSessionId, @AuditRecordLastId, '91305681-84d9-4bdb-965c-49409d09b409', @ParentRecordKeys, @ExtraInfo)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @ContextTxt = CAST(@AuditRecordLastId as VarChar(10))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @ContextLength = LEN(@ContextTxt)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @Context = CONVERT(binary(1), @ContextLength) + CONVERT(varbinary(127), @ContextTxt)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET context_info @Context" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecord]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordDate]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordUser]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordDatabaseUser]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordOperation]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordTransactionGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordTableGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordKeyValue]" + &auditData += !",'19e6e0f9-d7f1-4ce0-b2b0-fdef488be3f4'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@GrupProCod_Deleted" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@GrupProCod_Inserted )" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"END" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END " + NewLine() &auditData += !"FETCH NEXT FROM Cursor_Deleted_Records INTO @EmpCod_Deleted, @GrupCod_Deleted, @GrupComItmCod_Deleted, @GrupObsCod_Deleted, @GrupProCod_Deleted, @GrupObsComp_Deleted" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END " + NewLine() &auditData += !"CLOSE Cursor_Inserted_Records;" + NewLine() &auditData += !"CLOSE Cursor_Deleted_Records;" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END" + NewLine() EndSub
Sub 'Delete' &auditData += format(!"CREATE TRIGGER [%1].[AuditCategoriaProdutosComplementosDelete]", &Schema) + NewLine() &auditData += format(!"ON [%1].[CategoriaProdutosComplementos]", &Schema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"AFTER DELETE" + NewLine() &auditData += !"AS" + NewLine() &auditData += !"BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET NOCOUNT ON;" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @Context varbinary(128)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @ContextTxt VarChar(100)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @ContextLength tinyint" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @DatabaseUser VarChar(80)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @UserNameVar VarChar(100)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @ExtraInfo VarChar(1000)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @index decimal(10,0)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordSessionId VarChar(36)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordId decimal(10,0)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordLastId decimal(10,0)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordLastTableId VarChar(36)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys VarChar(410)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RecordKeys VarChar(410)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @ParentRecordKeys VarChar(410)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @EmpCod_Deleted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @GrupCod_Deleted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @GrupComItmCod_Deleted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @GrupObsCod_Deleted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @GrupProCod_Deleted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @GrupObsComp_Deleted VARCHAR(MAX)" + NewLine()
&auditData += !"DECLARE Cursor_Deleted_Records CURSOR FOR SELECT EmpCod, GrupCod, GrupComItmCod, GrupObsCod, GrupProCod, GrupObsComp FROM DELETED" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @DatabaseUser = SUSER_NAME()" + NewLine() &auditData += !"IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#AuditPlusSessionContext') IS NOT NULL BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @UserNameVar = username, @AuditRecordSessionId = sessionid, @AuditRecordLastId = auditid, @AuditRecordLastTableId = tableid, @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys = recordkeys, @ExtraInfo = extrainfo FROM #AuditPlusSessionContext WHERE id = 1;" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END ELSE BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += !"CREATE TABLE #AuditPlusSessionContext (id INT PRIMARY KEY, username VarChar(100), sessionid VarChar(36), auditid decimal(10,0), tableid VarChar(36), recordkeys VarChar(800), extrainfo VarChar(1000));" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @UserNameVar = ''" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordSessionId = CAST(NEWID() as VarChar(36))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastId = 0" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastTableId = ''" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys = ''" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @ExtraInfo = ''" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @Context = CONTEXT_INFO()" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @ContextLength = CONVERT(tinyint, SUBSTRING(@Context, 1, 1))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @ContextTxt = CONVERT(varchar(10), SUBSTRING(@Context, 2, 1 + @ContextLength))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"IF @ContextTxt IS NOT NULL AND ISNUMERIC(@ContextTxt) = 1 BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @AuditRecordLastId = CONVERT(float, @ContextTxt)" + NewLine() &auditData += format(!"SELECT @AuditRecordSessionId = [AuditRecordSessionId], @AuditRecordLastTableId = [AuditRecordTableGuid], @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys = [AuditRecordKeyValue] FROM [%1].[%2].[AuditRecord] WHERE [AuditRecordId] = @AuditRecordLastId;", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"END" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"OPEN Cursor_Deleted_Records" + NewLine() &auditData += !"FETCH NEXT FROM Cursor_Deleted_Records INTO @EmpCod_Deleted, @GrupCod_Deleted, @GrupComItmCod_Deleted, @GrupObsCod_Deleted, @GrupProCod_Deleted, @GrupObsComp_Deleted" + NewLine() &auditData += !"WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0" + NewLine() &auditData += !"BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @RecordKeys = RTRIM(CAST(@EmpCod_Deleted AS varchar(80))) + ', ' + RTRIM(CAST(@GrupCod_Deleted AS varchar(80))) + ', ' + RTRIM(CAST(@GrupComItmCod_Deleted AS varchar(80)))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @ParentRecordKeys = RTRIM(CAST(@EmpCod_Deleted AS varchar(80))) + ', ' + RTRIM(CAST(@GrupCod_Deleted AS varchar(80)))" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"IF NOT (@AuditRecordLastTableId = '91305681-84d9-4bdb-965c-49409d09b409' AND @ParentRecordKeys = @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys) BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastId = 0" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecord]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordDate]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordUser]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordDatabaseUser]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordOperation]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordTransactionGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordTableGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordKeyValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordSessionId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordParentId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordExtraInformation])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(GETDATE()" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@UserNameVar" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@DatabaseUser" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'UPDATE'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'ea965c6d-99dd-42f0-a80d-1152354ee841'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'91305681-84d9-4bdb-965c-49409d09b409'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@ParentRecordKeys" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@AuditRecordSessionId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",0" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@ExtraInfo)" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastId = SCOPE_IDENTITY()" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DELETE FROM #AuditPlusSessionContext WHERE id = 1" + NewLine() &auditData += !"INSERT INTO #AuditPlusSessionContext VALUES (1, @UserNameVar, @AuditRecordSessionId, @AuditRecordLastId, '91305681-84d9-4bdb-965c-49409d09b409', @ParentRecordKeys, @ExtraInfo)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @ContextTxt = CAST(@AuditRecordLastId as VarChar(10))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @ContextLength = LEN(@ContextTxt)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @Context = CONVERT(binary(1), @ContextLength) + CONVERT(varbinary(127), @ContextTxt)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET context_info @Context" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecord]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordDate]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordUser]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordDatabaseUser]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordOperation]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordTransactionGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordTableGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordKeyValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordSessionId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordParentId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordExtraInformation])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(GETDATE()" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@UserNameVar" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@DatabaseUser" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'DELETE'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'ea965c6d-99dd-42f0-a80d-1152354ee841'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'8b7e01a6-427b-47a0-aae4-4fde78392e55'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@RecordKeys" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@AuditRecordSessionId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@AuditRecordLastId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@ExtraInfo)" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordId = SCOPE_IDENTITY()" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributeGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesOldValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesNewValue])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'')" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributeGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesOldValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesNewValue])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(@AuditRecordId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@index" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'0e1b6d7e-3113-418c-a15d-c92c7edaa8bd'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@GrupCod_Deleted" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'')" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributeGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesOldValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesNewValue])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(@AuditRecordId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@index" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'8d40114b-0615-474a-b970-ecec9835e4f0'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@GrupComItmCod_Deleted" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'')" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributeGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesOldValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesNewValue])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(@AuditRecordId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@index" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'b4c1eb11-54e1-4345-8787-6f4c97ae8855'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@GrupObsCod_Deleted" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'')" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributeGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesOldValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesNewValue])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(@AuditRecordId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@index" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'19e6e0f9-d7f1-4ce0-b2b0-fdef488be3f4'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@GrupProCod_Deleted" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'')" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += format(!"INSERT INTO [%1].[%2].[AuditRecordAttributes]", &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"([AuditRecordId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesId]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributeGuid]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesOldValue]" + NewLine() &auditData += !",[AuditRecordAttributesNewValue])" + NewLine() &auditData += !"VALUES" + NewLine() &auditData += !"(@AuditRecordId" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@index" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'1cfc3cbf-4445-4e52-8758-1cd534987b4c'" + NewLine() &auditData += !",@GrupObsComp_Deleted" + NewLine() &auditData += !",'')" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @index = @index + 1" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine()
&auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"FETCH NEXT FROM Cursor_Deleted_Records INTO @EmpCod_Deleted, @GrupCod_Deleted, @GrupComItmCod_Deleted, @GrupObsCod_Deleted, @GrupProCod_Deleted, @GrupObsComp_Deleted" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END " + NewLine() &auditData += !"CLOSE Cursor_Deleted_Records;" + NewLine() &auditData += !"END" + NewLine() EndSub
